title: Chio HTTP Receipt
description: Signed receipt proving that an HTTP request was evaluated by the Chio kernel. The signature covers canonical JSON of all fields except 'signature' itself.

request_id.description: Unique request ID this receipt covers.

method.description: HTTP method of the evaluated request.

caller_identity_hash.description: SHA-256 hex hash of the caller identity.

session_id.description: Session ID the request belonged to.

verdict.description: Whether the guard passed (true) or denied (false).

details.description: Human-readable details about the guard's decision.

response_status.description: HTTP status Chio associated with the evaluation outcome at receipt-signing time. For deny receipts this is the concrete Chio error status; allow receipts may carry evaluation-time status metadata rather than downstream response evidence.

timestamp.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) when the receipt was created.

content_hash.description: SHA-256 hex hash binding the request content to this receipt.

policy_hash.description: SHA-256 hex hash of the policy that was applied.

capability_id.description: Capability ID that was exercised, if any.

kernel_key.description: Kernel's Ed25519 public key (32 bytes, hex-encoded).

signature.description: Ed25519 signature over canonical JSON of the body fields (64 bytes, hex-encoded).
